title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 12–14, this part follows Unknown person #10, Giants, Usopp, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Loki as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Could you repeat that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Great imu???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Mobile the entire nation...

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: ...and form a grand army of Warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The giant warrior fleet will stand alongside the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...and serve the world as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait, no!! Hold on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything I've done was to free Elbaf from violence!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course... If anyone still wishes to fight, I'll gladly encourage them to enlist in the Marines. But!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is the King talking to in there?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thou vowed to ATONE for ElbAF's History!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even at the cost of becoming a slave!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I meant to carry that burden alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The burden of such history is Too Great for Thee To Bear Alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now hold thy Tongue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thou cannot Disney Mu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who enter into a deep sea covenant may gain immortality and power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but it comes at the cost of total obedience!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thou will carry out Mu's orders... regardless of Thine own will!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This isn't good... I'm losing control!! Elbaf..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They never meant for it to become part of the fold!! Curse that,IM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Guards!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The plan was always...

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: ...to ensure the Warriors of e!Baf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What is it, your majesty?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is someone-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Chair me to this pillar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hurry!! <a href=" JARUL AND MY SONS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, sire, I believe hajrudin is still out at sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Loki... Lord Loki, that is, is still imprisoned after what happened!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I can't resist for long!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What exactly is this concerning, your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: None of that matters now!! Release him!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
